message:
data: append audit index and beads issue tracker updates

audit_index.jsonl: five new audit verdicts from SwiftBluff (2026-04-10)
covering the mysql in_transaction status flag fix, the H1 cycle test
restoration, the trace/boundary follow-up compile fix, and a SOUND
re-read of the lab/explorer scoring path after the boundary changes.

.beads/issues.jsonl: import latest issue updates including new
fresh-eyes audit beads, comments, and status changes accumulated
during the recent audit pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
